definition: The twenty-fifth letter of the English alphabet, called wy or wye and written in the Latin script.
definitions: The twenty-fifth letter of the English alphabet, called wy or wye and written in the Latin script.

definition: Nonstandard spelling of you.
definitions: Nonstandard spelling of you.

definition: A slick and light ship for making pleasure trips or racing on water, having sails but often motor-powered. At times used as a residence offshore on a dock.
definitions: A slick and light ship for making pleasure trips or racing on water, having sails but often motor-powered. At times used as a residence offshore on a dock.
Any vessel used for private, noncommercial purposes.

definition: A small, usually uncultivated area adjoining or (now especially) within the precincts of a house or other building.
definitions: A small, usually uncultivated area adjoining or (now especially) within the precincts of a house or other building.
The property surrounding one's house, typically dominated by one's lawn.

definition: A twisted strand of fibre used for knitting or weaving.
definitions: A twisted strand of fibre used for knitting or weaving.
Bundles of fibres twisted together, and which in turn are twisted in bundles to form strands, which in their turn are twisted or plaited to form rope.

definition: To open the mouth widely and take a long, rather deep breath, often because one is tired or bored, and sometimes accompanied by pandiculation.
definitions: To open the mouth widely and take a long, rather deep breath, often because one is tired or bored, and sometimes accompanied by pandiculation.
To say while yawning.

definition: You (the people being addressed).
definitions: You (the people being addressed).
You (the singular person being addressed).

definition: Yes.
definitions: Yes.
Used to express acknowledgment of what was previously said.

definition: A period of time akin to the time taken for the Earth to undergo a full cycle of seasons.
definitions: A period of time akin to the time taken for the Earth to undergo a full cycle of seasons.
The time taken for the Earth to return to the same position along the ecliptic, completing a full cycle of seasons; a tropical year or solar year.

definition: Happening once every year.
definitions: Happening once every year.
Over the course of one year

definition: To have a strong desire for something or to do something; to long for or to do something.
definitions: To have a strong desire for something or to do something; to long for or to do something.
To long for something in the past with melancholy or nostalgia.

definition: A wistful or melancholy longing.
definitions: A wistful or melancholy longing.

definition: plural of year.
definitions: plural of year.

definition: An often humid, yellowish froth produced by fermenting malt worts, and used to brew beer, leaven bread, and also used in certain medicines.
definitions: An often humid, yellowish froth produced by fermenting malt worts, and used to brew beer, leaven bread, and also used in certain medicines.
A single-celled fungus of a wide variety of taxonomic families.

definition: To shout; holler; make a loud sound with the voice, especially to express intense emotions such as anger or excitement.
definitions: To shout; holler; make a loud sound with the voice, especially to express intense emotions such as anger or excitement.
To convey by shouting.

definition: The color of sunflower petals and lemons; the color obtained by mixing green and red light, or by subtracting blue from white light; the color evoked by light of wavelength around 580 nm; one of the three primary colors in subtractive color systems.
definitions: The color of sunflower petals and lemons; the color obtained by mixing green and red light, or by subtracting blue from white light; the color evoked by light of wavelength around 580 nm; one of the three primary colors in subtractive color systems.
The middle light in a set of three traffic lights, the lighting of which indicates that drivers should stop short of the intersection if it is safe to do so.

definition: Used to show agreement or acceptance.
definitions: Used to show agreement or acceptance.
Used to indicate disagreement or dissent in reply to a negative statement.

definition: The day immediately before today; one day ago.
definitions: The day immediately before today; one day ago.
The past, often in terms of being outdated.

definition: Thus far; up to the present; up to some unspecified time.
definitions: Thus far; up to the present; up to some unspecified time.
In negative or interrogative use, often with an expectation or potential of something happening in the future.

definition: Definition unavailable in this build.
definitions: Definition unavailable in this build.

definition: To give as a result or outcome; to produce or render.
definitions: To give as a result or outcome; to produce or render.
To produce as return from an investment.

definition: present participle and gerund of yield
definitions: present participle and gerund of yield

definition: A greeting similar to hi.
definitions: A greeting similar to hi.
An interjection similar to hey.

definition: Any of several Hindu or Buddhist disciplines aimed at training the consciousness for a state of perfect spiritual insight and tranquillity; especially a system of exercises practiced to promote control of the body and mind.
definitions: Any of several Hindu or Buddhist disciplines aimed at training the consciousness for a state of perfect spiritual insight and tranquillity; especially a system of exercises practiced to promote control of the body and mind.

definition: A milk-based product stiffened by a bacterium-aided curdling process, and sometimes mixed with fruit or other flavoring.
definitions: A milk-based product stiffened by a bacterium-aided curdling process, and sometimes mixed with fruit or other flavoring.
Any similar product based on other substances (e.g. soy yogurt).

definition: Senses relating to a frame around the neck.
definitions: Senses relating to a frame around the neck.

A bar or frame by which two oxen or other draught animals are joined at their necks enabling them to pull a cart, plough, etc.; (by extension) a device attached to a single draught animal for the same purpose.

definition: The yellow, spherical part of an egg that is surrounded by the white albumen, and serves as nutriment for the growing young.
definitions: The yellow, spherical part of an egg that is surrounded by the white albumen, and serves as nutriment for the growing young.
The grease in a sheep's fleece; lanolin.

definition: The people spoken, or written to, as an object.
definitions: The people spoken, or written to, as an object.
(To) yourselves, (to) yourself.

definition: In the early part of growth or life; born not long ago.
definitions: In the early part of growth or life; born not long ago.
At an early stage of existence or development; having recently come into existence.

definition: comparative form of young: more young
definitions: comparative form of young: more young
Synonym of junior.

definition: A young person.
definitions: A young person.

definition: Belonging to you; of you; related to you (singular; one owner).
definitions: Belonging to you; of you; related to you (singular; one owner).
Belonging to you; of you; related to you (plural; more owners).

definition: That or those belonging to you; the possessive second-person singular pronoun used without a following noun.
definitions: That or those belonging to you; the possessive second-person singular pronoun used without a following noun.
Your house or home.

definition: Your own self (singular).
definitions: Your own self (singular).
You (singular); used emphatically, especially to indicate exclusiveness of the referent's participation in the predicate, i.e., that no one else is involved.

definition: Inflection of you (plural) used as the object of a verb or non-locative preposition in a clause whose subject is the same (the people addressed).
definitions: Inflection of you (plural) used as the object of a verb or non-locative preposition in a clause whose subject is the same (the people addressed).
You (plural), used to intensify the subject as the group addressed.

definition: The quality or state of being young.
definitions: The quality or state of being young.
The part of life following childhood; the period of existence preceding maturity or age; the whole early part of life, from childhood, or, sometimes, from infancy, to adulthood.

definition: Young or seeming young.
definitions: Young or seeming young.
Characteristic of young people.
